comment: Files attached to every GitHub release as named assets, alongside firmware.bin. Used for assets that are too large for firmware/initial_filesystem/ provisioning (which embeds files into the .bin). The badge's Asset Library pulls these via the stable URL pattern https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/releases/latest/download/<name>. See firmware/docs/OTA-MAINTAINER.md § 2 for the full workflow.

assets.name: doom1.wad
assets.description: DOOM 1 shareware WAD. Untracked in git (~4 MB); CI fetches it from the fallback URL when local_path is absent.
